title: Transfer / multi-currency — bridge options
intro: Use regulated transfer tools for cross-border cash movement while a Dutch account is pending — confirm acceptance for rent and salary separately.

items.reason: Onboarding: online signup for multi-currency balances and international transfers. Best for: moving money between countries with transparent fee and rate breakdowns on Wise’s site. Watch-outs: not a full replacement for every Dutch direct debit or landlord workflow — read limits and verification steps before you rely on it.

disclosure: Some links may be affiliate or referral links. If you use them, we may earn a commission at no extra cost to you. Ordering reflects page relevance, not pay-to-rank placement. Always confirm scope, pricing, and terms with the provider directly.
